generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - another terror cell busted plotting attacks on our infrastructure. They were communicating through encrypted apps the feds couldn't monitor. This is exactly why we need to expand domestic security powers. Civil liberties are important, but not at the cost of our safety. When will politicians prioritize protecting Americans over political correctness? #NationalSecurityFirst #ExpandSecurityPowers
